pi_items.source: Task specification - this is a data element users should CREATE, not extract from demo data
DHIS2 Sierra Leone demo database confirmed to contain 'child program' tracker program; Multiple sources confirm this exists in Sierra Leone demo version 2.38.2.1+

DHIS2 documentation confirms that Immunization eRegistry and similar tracker programs support 'Birth details' stages; However, specific confirmation that Sierra Leone's Child Programme contains a 'Birth' stage could not be independently verified despite extensive search
DHIS2 documentation and community forums confirm BOOLEAN is the standard value type for yes/no boolean questions in tracker programs. Export script verifies against ['BOOLEAN', 'TRUE_ONLY', 'YES_NO']
Official DHIS2 databases website; Both URLs return HTTP 200; Setup script explicitly states 'This is official real-world demo data from the DHIS2 project'
Setup script explicitly states this is 'official real-world demo data from the DHIS2 project' based on actual Sierra Leone health system implementation

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real-world demo data from the official DHIS2 Sierra Leone database. The Sierra Leone demo contains a 'child program' tracker program where users must create a new 'Chlorhexidine Gel Applied' data element with BOOLEAN value type and add it to the Birth stage as a compulsory field. The BOOLEAN value type is the correct DHIS2 standard for yes/no boolean data elements in tracker programs.
